label: Global FFmpeg configuration
description: Global FFmpeg settings including binary path, global args, hwaccel options, and per-role output args.

path.label: FFmpeg path
path.description: Path to the FFmpeg binary to use globally or a version alias.

global_args.label: Global FFmpeg arguments
global_args.description: Global args passed to FFmpeg processes by default.

hwaccel_args.label: FFmpeg hardware acceleration arguments
hwaccel_args.description: Global hardware acceleration arguments for FFmpeg (auto or provider-specific).

input_args.label: FFmpeg input arguments
input_args.description: Global input arguments applied to FFmpeg input streams by default.

output_args.label: FFmpeg output arguments per role
output_args.description: Default output args used for different FFmpeg roles such as detect and record.

detect.label: Detect role FFmpeg output arguments
detect.description: Default output args for detect role streams.

record.label: Record role FFmpeg output arguments
record.description: Default output args for record role streams.

inputs.label: Camera inputs
inputs.description: List of input stream definitions (paths and roles) for this camera.

path.label: Camera input path
path.description: Camera input stream URL or path.

roles.label: Roles assigned to this input
roles.description: Roles for this input stream (for example: detect, record, audio).

global_args.label: FFmpeg global arguments
global_args.description: Global FFmpeg arguments for this input stream.

hwaccel_args.label: FFmpeg hardware acceleration arguments
hwaccel_args.description: Hardware acceleration arguments for this input stream.

input_args.label: FFmpeg input arguments
input_args.description: Input arguments specific to this stream.

retry_interval.label: Time in seconds to wait before FFmpeg retries connecting to the camera
retry_interval.description: Seconds to wait before attempting to reconnect a camera stream after failure.

apple_compatibility.label: Set tag on HEVC (H.265) recording stream to improve compatibility with Apple players
apple_compatibility.description: Enable HEVC tagging for better Apple player compatibility when recording H.265.

gpu.label: GPU index to use for hardware acceleration
gpu.description: Default GPU index used for hardware acceleration if available.
